Button.TooltipReference: Click to automatically assign agents to this Overseer Quest
Click to preview the rewards for this Overseer Quest
Click to abandon this Overseer Quest
Click to instantly complete this Overseer Quest
Click to complete this Overseer Quest
Click to complete this Overseer Quest and receive your rewards
Click to start this Overseer Quest
This Agent was Incapacitated while Questing.
This agent is Iconic and is either currently questing, incapacitated, or selected for a quest

Label.TooltipReference: This count does not include any active conversion quests
This count does not include any active conversion quests

Editbox.TooltipReference: Enter the number of duplicate agents you wish to keep (minimum 1).

Button.TooltipReference: Converts many duplicate agents of a specific rarity at once. You must specify the number of duplicate agents you wish to keep at the end of the mass conversion (with a minimum of 1).

Label.Text: You currently do not have any agents!

Label.TooltipReference: This count does not include any active conversion quests

Screen.TooltipReference: These counts do not include any active/completed conversion quests
